message:
fix(checkpoint): return proper errors in JSON mode; add naive scheduler benchmark; fix tutorial alt screen

- checkpoint restore: suppress json.Encode return and always return the
  actual error so callers see a non-nil error instead of silently
  swallowing failures behind JSON output
- deps_test: add BenchmarkDependencyGraphSchedulingNaiveBaseline with
  naive O(n) ready-step helpers to quantify the O(1) improvement from
  the incremental tracker
- tutorial: enter alt screen on Init regardless of skipAnimations flag
  to prevent rendering artifacts in non-animated mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
